title: Corteva: Major Acquisition Should Fuel Growth

title: Corteva Announces Dates for Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2022 Earnings Release and Webcast
text: INDIANAPOLIS , Jan. 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Corteva, Inc. (NYSE: CTVA) today announced it will release its fourth quarter and full year 2022 earnings on Wednesday, February 1, 2023, after the stock market close via PR Newswire and its website. The Company will host a live webcast of its fourth quarter and full year 2022 earnings conference call on Thursday, February 2, 2023, at 9:00 a.m.
